title: Research Kconfig and overlays for native_posix BLE ingress excluding link layer
description: Analyze existing prj.conf in lichen/tests/ble_ingress/, lichen/apps/gateway/, ble_ipsp_transport and determine what needs to be enabled/disabled for native_posix target without link.35.6. List required CONFIG_ options for BLE, IPSP, native_posix simulation.
close_reason: Kconfig research completed and native_posix_ble_ingress.conf updated with full list of required CONFIG options for BLE, IPSP simulation, native_posix target without link layer. Build command documented. Verified via cmake-only.
